title: T-033 — Server Action convertBriefToFa (NPD-b.3) + V08 audit
prompt:
# T-033 — convertBriefToFa Server Action

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §9.3, §9.4, §12 V08 + UX brief_convert_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:89-140

## Goal
convertBriefToFa(briefId, productCode) Server Action: gates on brief.status='complete', creates product row pre-populated with mapped fields per Reference.BriefFieldMapping, creates ProdDetail rows per components, locks brief (status='converted'), emits brief.converted + fa.created, writes brief_to_fa_audit row enabling V08.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0032 adds brief_to_fa_audit(id, brief_id, product_code, field_name, applied BOOLEAN, mapping_version, created_at). Action enforces RBAC brief.convert_to_fa, validates brief readiness, runs single tx: insert product, insert prod_detail rows from components, copy mapped fields per BriefFieldMapping, run allergen seed (delegated to NPD-c chain), set brief.status='converted'. V08 evaluation reads audit rows to confirm all mandatory fields applied.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0032_brief_to_fa_audit.sql [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/actions/convert-brief-to-fa.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/actions/__tests__/convert-brief-to-fa.test.ts [create]
- packages/validation/src/v08-brief-mapping.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given brief in status='complete' with all 13 V08 mandatory fields populated, when convertBriefToFa runs, then product row created with mapped fields, prod_detail rows = component count, brief.status='converted'
2. Given brief in status='draft', when convertBriefToFa called, then GateError thrown with code 'BRIEF_NOT_COMPLETE'
3. Given V08 evaluation post-convert, when all 13 mandatory mappings have brief_to_fa_audit.applied=TRUE, then v08() returns PASS; if any optional missing, returns INFO/WARN per §12 table

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering happy path, gate, V08 PASS
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test convert-brief-to-fa && pnpm --filter validation test v08'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip transaction
- Do not bypass brief readiness gate
- Do not unlock brief once converted

pipeline_inputs.description: Convert brief to FA with mapped fields, ProdDetail rows, audit log, V08 PASS evaluation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single transaction: insert product, prod_detail per component, apply mappings via Reference.BriefFieldMapping, write brief_to_fa_audit rows, lock brief, emit events. V08 evaluation reads audit rows.
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen cascade seed (NPD-c chain)
Do not implement Convert modal UI here (T-034)
acceptance_criteria: Given brief status='complete' with all 13 V08 mandatory fields, when convertBriefToFa runs, then product row created with mapped fields, prod_detail rows equal component count, brief.status='converted'
Given brief status='draft', when convertBriefToFa called, then GateError thrown with code 'BRIEF_NOT_COMPLETE'
Given post-convert V08 evaluation, when all 13 mandatory mappings have applied=TRUE, then v08() returns PASS
test_strategy: RED: 3 tests covering happy path, gate, V08 PASS before action exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test convert-brief-to-fa && pnpm --filter validation test v08'
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass brief readiness gate
Do not unlock brief once converted
